about.name: Kaze
about.title: CTO & Founder | Elite Security Researcher
about.tagline: Building the future, one exploit at a time.
about.bio: Cybersecurity visionary with deep expertise in AI/ML Security, Cloud Infrastructure, and Offensive Research. Passionate about building products that are both beautiful and bulletproof.

items.name: AI/ML Security
items.description: Prompt injection, data poisoning, LLM exploitation, and AI-driven defense systems.

items.name: Cloud & Infrastructure
items.description: Cloud-Native security for Kubernetes, Docker, and microservices across AWS, Azure, GCP.

items.name: Offensive Security
items.description: Red teaming, penetration testing for REST/GraphQL/gRPC APIs, and modern web frameworks.

items.name: Product Management
items.description: Product roadmap, user story crafting, feature prioritization, and business logic optimization.
Leading technical vision for an AI-powered cybersecurity platform. Architecting scalable infrastructure and building a Zero Trust culture.
Managed enterprise security operations, integrated DevSecOps into CI/CD pipelines, and conducted red team exercises.
Discovered critical vulnerabilities in Fortune 500 companies. Specialized in API security and cloud misconfigurations.
